yeah i saw some diff tracks on the video

Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:13 AM

sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:13 AM

Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:14 AM

sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:15 AM
oh ok
is it just an app on homebrew
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:15 AM
yea
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:16 AM
nice
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:16 AM
me and couple friends coded it
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:16 AM
was it hard
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:17 AM
there was open source code we used
like the connecting and downloading source was there
but we coded almost everything else
before it would downlload 1 .txt file thats it
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:17 AM
how long did it take
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:18 AM
2/3 months
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:18 AM
oh damn
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:18 AM
it used to look very janky
and no version control
meaning everytime u opened the update u would download every update again
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:18 AM
ohhhh
damn
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:18 AM
but we made it so it doesnt do that
Bad Wolf actually helped with the version control
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:19 AM
it looks pretty neat now
bad wolf goated
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:20 AM
i had most of the code. it was just fixing something stupid tbh
sasuke 28-Nov-20 03:20 AM
you might be able to get 255MP to help make it better
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:20 AM
the only thing it needs is a reconnecting protocal and a gui
other than that it works
and it isnt hosted on my pc
i bought a server for 1.25 a month
which hosts it
24/7

you bought a whole server
Optllizer 28-Nov-20 03:21 AM
nah
small section of one

oh ok

hi?
I have had a few people join the ctgp revolution classic server just to post a meme insulting the community of the pack
it doesn't matter if it's accurate or not, it's very disrespectful
one of these people is a moderator here
Optllizer 04-Apr-21 03:29 PM
id appreciate not bring this up in this server and handle it in dms, because I personally have nothing todo with it.
i cant control what my users do. Its just how it is.
エルマー 04-Apr-21 03:30 PM
Yea but it’s a moderator from here
Bashi 04-Apr-21 03:30 PM
I was thinking those people who did it should see what I have to say
エルマー 04-Apr-21 03:31 PM
That kinda changes the context a bit
Bashi 04-Apr-21 03:31 PM
and I will not tolerate the continuation of it
エルマー 04-Apr-21 03:31 PM
It’s indeed very annoying
Optllizer 04-Apr-21 03:32 PM
Even if, Its just a harmless joke. if you think its somehow offensive or whatever idk what to say. People clown me and people clown packs all the time. Just delete messages and ignore it. Dont be starting shit in my own discord because of somthing that happened in a different server.
But
for the time being Jeff will be getting his mod revoked
Bashi 04-Apr-21 03:33 PM
hold up, I think that's too much
sure, he was disrespectful, but not being able to moderate is a big deal
it would only be appropriate if he continued this behaviour in other cases
but in the end, it's not my choice

hey yall, this is my 1st time installing the pack, and im just curious, i was reading the install tutorial and saw that u copy and replace the apps folder and what not, that being said, does doing that mess up/change everything else? (for example would ctgp or anything else be messed up?)

ight ty :)

Coz 04-May-21 12:18 AM
ah ok

Optllizer 04-May-21 12:21 AM
Thats fine man, ask away. You need to create it
when the ZIP is created it deletes the folder
cuz its empty
Coz 04-May-21 12:22 AM
ohhhhh ok good to know
Optllizer 04-May-21 12:22 AM
"My Stuff"
should be the name
i do not recommend putting menu files like menusingles in the folder
might mess with OptPack cups and track names
its more for music and character textures/mods (edited)

Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 04:40 PM
Can I play OptPack as installed image on Wii via USB Loader GX?
I installed it but choosing a custom cup for single player local grand prix gave me an exception error.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 04:44 PM
Usb loader gx should work
Are there custom cups ?
@Boogiskhan
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 04:53 PM
Yes
Playing solo, local, grand prix, chose two different custom cups and every time had to force shutdown console since I couldn't exit the exception screen.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 04:56 PM
Could you try wiiflow or configurable USB Loader.
Just want to see if its a usb loader gx problem then go on from there
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:01 PM
Will try out, give me a few
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:02 PM
Take your time
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:35 PM
Doesn't seem to work on WiiFlow either. I tried another one that didn't work on USB loader GX and that worked on WiiFlow.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:35 PM
So none worked ?
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:35 PM
Optllizer
So none worked ?
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:36 PM
Aye. I am really bloody new to Wii modding, so I don't know about configurable USB loader. Could it be I have to use opt patch from Hombrew Channel before?
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:37 PM
No, the updater is for disc users only
Give me about 10 mins
I am sorry for the problems
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:39 PM
It's alright, I appreciate the work.
No need to apologise.
1. First drag and drop the current main download optpack zip file from downloads into the same directory as the builder. then extract. --> Maybe I did something wrong here? I put both zip files (optpack and builder) in the same directory and then extracted them. Maybe that caused data confusion? 2. Make sure you are using the correct patch.json, by default its normal OptPack mode. patchtt.json is TT Online mode. If you want to play TT Online, then rename the default patch.json to patchnormal.json, then rename patchtt.json to patch.json. --> I did this. Should I maybe try without the TT onlin configuration?
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:52 PM
I tried the same wbsf with Dolphin, it gave this error.
After clicking ignore, same exception.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:55 PM
Maybe the wbfs is broken
Where did you download
Right click on ur optpack folder
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:57 PM
From archive.org (AlvRo). I used the same wbfs for all other custom distributions and it worked fine. However ... I now tried the image without the TT online option. And this one seems to work.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:57 PM
U tried tt online ?
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:57 PM
Successfully started a custom cup that previously gave me errors and I am on USB Loader GX.
Yes, before I tried TT online wbfs. I did both. One with tt online config, the other without.
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:58 PM
Maybe tt online is broken
Im probably didabling it soon
Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 05:58 PM
The one without seems to work fine
Optllizer 11-Sep-21 05:58 PM

Boogiskhan 11-Sep-21 06:01 PM

heres a weird method to try
turn off the wii
unplug it
hold the power button for 30 seconds
plug it in
turn it on
load ctgp
go into a WW and see if it helps
